# Reproducible Simulations

This folder contains toy models showing proof-of-mechanism.

## Outputs

- `ranking_boundary_curve.svg` — a target item crosses rank thresholds when artificial signal increases its score.
- `feedback_multiplier_boost20.svg` — early signal compounds through exposure-engagement feedback.
- `fake_review_posterior_shift.svg` — fake reviews shift Bayesian perceived quality.
- `coordination_null_distribution_v8.svg` — repeated co-actions can be compared against a null model.
- `royalty_pool_diversion_curve.svg` — fake streams divert payout under proportional allocation.

## What these simulations prove

They prove the mechanisms are mathematically coherent and can produce outcome changes under stated assumptions.

## What they do not prove

They do not prove any specific actor used these tactics or that a specific platform uses these exact formulas.
